reviews.review_description: I love this games, but please update or add something.  I play this every morning to start my day.
It's the best game but don't know how to reload

Really addictive! But I agree. The game needs more, please. More guns or gun evolution, more rooms, more variety of zombies maybe, clearer ways to survive longer like health packs or ammo packs, maybe more variety in general creativity. MULTIPLAYER is a must!!!!!!!!😁🔥

Thanks!
Extremely boring one gun one moves
I just hope they release more games and more features! This one is awesome!

Bro it gets so boring very fast and you can’t even move and they give you one gun and the guns suck they give you old gun from the 1800
Please update it and I might leave a better review bye.
The only problem being the lack of content. Introduce more weapons, different rooms, more detailed/gorier damage to the body, etc.
I want to be able to move and add more rooms and weapons i am deleting this now
It's not great. The zombies aren't too bad, but how long can you stay engaged with just shooting zombies that come around the corner with one weapon that runs out of bullets in a minute or less.
My sister is scared of it and it's just gets so boring
bro they only give you one weapon and it gets boring really fast plus I waited so long for it to download and got a lame game

I say it’s kinda good it’s kinda fun when I shoot the zombies but it’s only a shooter u only get one weapon and and it gets boring pretty fast I wish they would add more weapons I would maybe play again if it has a big update like new maps and new weapons or u can move and a sandbox map that would be pretty good and bit extra gore cuz idk
This game is like a 2005 Windows PC with a virus.Bad aiming. You get no bullets. Zombies take 3 bullets each. And YOU CANT MOVE. Plus I’m spam firing a gun from the 1800s. The developer is so lazy.

Um, hello, it's zombies. Gotta hit them in the head. I'm hoping the developers keep up with this one. Sure, guns could be cooler and motion would be nice. After a couple of rounds then the laser light pops up and it's easier to get em, but they keep coming faster. I'll wait for upgrades but it's a nice start.

reviews.review_title: This is what zombies should look like!
reviews.review_description: The game is new and has a lot of work to be done on it, but it has GREAT potential to be a huge zombie shooting game on the Quest 3 or 3S.  The looks and actions of the zombies blow my mind and is so much better than any other zombie shooter on the Quest today. Sure, there are things that need working on still, but it was a free game and it's going to be great in the future when they finish this game. Download it now while it is still cheap and one day you will be very happy you did.

Real potential here! Nasty looking Z’s, progressive difficulty, nice headshot effects. I figure they’ll get better guns at some point. 

The only thing is that the center wall scoreboard wastes a lot of screen real estate. Otherwise it is a great shooter game. Try it.
this game is booty the accuracy is so bad bro when i point the gun at the fat zombie bro it shoots in the other direction like bro icl ts pmo fr fr ts js pmo
Oh I wasn't sure the first 30seconds. But once they get moving. The anxiety goes up lol. cant wait to see what else this game will have to offer.

This game is so bad i couldn’t even walk or reload the gun I would of give this 0 stars if I can
.

reviews.review_title: I am never playing this game again
reviews.review_description: This game is so smash me out. The two guns are just trash. The zombies are trash. Everything is trash and you can’t even reload the guns.
Great zombie shooter! The game is simple but very atmospheric—perfect for unwinding after work.
Look run out of ammo too soon ! Takes a lot to kill one ! Good game ! Needs some rethinking !
Shockingly bad and boring
This game is so great. I love it.
The Guns can be better and the i donot like the Front wall bit is very funny

So far I love it Yes I do have minor glitches but honestly it's still being developed so you kind of expect that. For a free game it's pretty bada$$ I've got no complaints I'm excited to see further updates definitely be something I'm on lookout for buying in the future when it's a complete game.
The game is creepy I wish it had more ammo and a way to doge attacks.

reviews.review_title: Probably the worst shooting game ever
reviews.review_description: Think of something really boring and then this being next level boring
This game sucks.
Spent hours messing around in this, something fun if you don't have long and want some good old round based zombie shooting
